Profile HomeWiFi on interface Wi-Fi:
=======================================================================
Applied: All User Profile

Profile information
-------------------
    Version                : 1
    Type                   : Wireless LAN
    Name                   : HomeWiFi
    Control options        :
        Connection mode    : Connect automatically

Security settings
-----------------
    Authentication         : WPA2-Personal
    Cipher                 : CCMP
    Security key           : Present

Cost settings
-------------

Security key details
--------------------
